toilets_with_bidets.details: For NSL side,Male: Unknown Female: yes, cubicle 1 & 8 (squatting) has bidets. Accessible toilet: unknown for tel side,. Female toilet: yes, cubicle 1 & 8 (squatting) has bidets. Female toilet: yes, cubicle 1 & 8 (squatting) has bidets. beside posb..
